name: profiles/active.sh prints the currently active profile name from the configured user state
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'active_profile: baseline\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/profile-state.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/profiles/active.sh" --state .claude-tdd-pro/profile-state.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'profile=baseline' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
